description: Style Note Without compromising on comfort, make sure your little one looks cute and fresh in this tee from madagascar 3. Clothes in soothing pastel shades and soft fabric ensure that kids stay comfortable throughout the day.Product Description Blue t-shirt has a round ribbed neck, short sleeves, white paneling from the shoulder to the cuff and graphic print on the frontMaterial and Care 100% cotton Wash with like colours Dry immediately after wash Iron on reverse
